texto: It were for me To throw my sceptre at the injurious gods
autor: To tell them that this world did equal theirs Till they had stolen our jewel.
explicacao: Citação de To tell them that this world did equal theirs Till they had stolen our jewel. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “It were for me To throw my sceptre at the injurious gods” articula reflexao, william-shakespeare, throw em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
